mapper.sql: id, alarm_no, latitude, longitude, location_accuracy, speed, direction, location_time, created_at, first_location_time, end_location_time, change_unit
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM location_track WHERE alarm_no = #{alarmNo} ORDER BY location_time DESC
SELECT FROM location_track WHERE alarm_no = #{alarmNo} ORDER BY end_location_time DESC, location_time DESC LIMIT 1
